title: ipomoea polymorpha var. delphinioides
intro: Ipomoea polymorpha var. delphinioides, also known as the purple passionflower, is a variety of the Ipomoea polymorpha plant, belonging to the morning glory family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of purple passionflower include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea polymorpha var. delphinioides include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal properties and health benefits.
